specific_question: Between July 1 and December 31, 2024, how many internal training workshops did Olivia Martinez organize on lifecycle documentation standards for Elexion staff?
answer: Training logs show that Olivia Martinez conducted 9 internal workshops on documentation standards between Q3 and Q4, 2024 for Elexion staff.
